name_en: 25C New Spring Collection Exquisite Small Chain Clutch 👜 Grained calfskin with gold metal, handle has a small logo, and a curved seam on the leather makes the bag look more structured. The grained leather is also scratch-resistant. The chain is detachable and can be carried by hand; the capacity is also suitable. Unique design and practicality make it my recent favorite.

Size: 17 x 19.5 x 5cm
Model: cc1017
